People are so used to doing what’s comfortable that when they see someone being uncomfortable making sacrifices to achieve their goals-it offends them. 

A lot of people don’t understand the sacrifice it takes to achieve certain goals, especially when it comes to fitness. When someone shares that they’re eating well, not drinking much booze, going to bed early it’s “you’re extreme” but when people eat McDonalds, party 4x a week, and not take care of themselves…. It’s “yolo” 

You’re only going to learn and do better by taking action. 
So stay triggered or start changing.

Your body  doesn’t care what you want, it cares what you do. 

I want to feel good. I want to look the best I’ve ever looked and if you do too, you’re in the right spot
It me.

You’re not a dog-you don’t need a treat for bring a “good girl” for eating well 

You don’t need a cheat day when you’ve had a cheat life 😬

Laying the foundation is the most important part!  You deserve a body you’re proud of. 

You deserve to be IN the pictures with your kids this summer, not just taking them. 

You deserve to look in the mirror and be happy with what you see. At. Any. Age. 

And you should NEVER feel bad about it. Ever. 

Losing my weight wasn’t just about a Jean size. It was lifting judgement, strengthening my confidence, 
and being an example. 

And I wanna help get you here 🫶🏻 cuz when you do. It’s life. Changing.

It’s ok if you want to lose weight. There I said it- in fact, if it’s to BETTER your health and happiness, I encourage it.

But before you can achieve it, you have to promise yourself you’ll stay consistent. 

If you want of join my program starting monday on how I did it-comment “link” here AND I have a $50 off code!!!! For this round ONLY

The promises you make to yourself are the hardest to keep and easiest to break. 

The reason you lack confidence is because you lack self belief. And the reason you lack self belief is because you dont keep the promises you make to yourself. 

Ive told myself for years i would keep weight off once and for all- yet i always found a reason to stop because no one was looking. 

A year ago I finally stuck with it - not because i want to share it here, but because i promised myself i would do it- and im keeping that promise. And now im down 17 lbs in a year (gained a lot in 2024) 

When you make promises to yourself and you dont keep them, you reinforce the thought pattern that you are someone who doesnt follow thru-

Just starting with the little shit- making my bed, going to the gym, saving the money- follow thru on what you said you will do and it’ll bleed into every other capacity of your life

Show up. For you. But also for the people who are praying on your downfall 🫶🏻

It’s ok if you want to lose weight. There I said it- in fact, if it’s to BETTER your health and happiness, I encourage it.

But before you can achieve it, you have to promise yourself you’ll stay consistent.

The promises you make to yourself are the hardest to keep and easiest to break. 

The reason you lack confidence is because you lack self belief. And the reason you lack self belief is because you dont keep the promises you make to yourself. 

Ive told myself for years i would keep weight off once and for all- yet i always found a reason to stop because no one was looking. 

A year ago I finally stuck with it - not because i want to share it here, but because i promised myself i would do it- and im keeping that promise. And now im down 17 lbs in a year (gained a lot in 2024) 

When you make promises to yourself and you dont keep them, you reinforce the thought pattern that you are someone who doesnt follow thru-

Just starting with the little shit- making my bed, going to the gym, saving the money- follow thru on what you said you will do and it’ll bleed into every other capacity of your life

Show up. For you. But also for the people who are praying on your downfall 🫶🏻
